mapper.insert: insert into dish_tag (dish_id, tag_name, tag_type, weight, create_time) values (#{dishId}, #{tagName}, #{tagType}, #{weight}, #{createTime})
mapper.select:
select rs.id, rs.user_id as userId, rs.user_query as userQuery, rs.parsed_intent as parsedIntent, count(rr.id) as resultCount, rs.create_time as createTime from recommend_session rs left join recommend_result rr on rs.id = rr.session_id
and rs.user_id = #{userId} and rs.user_query like concat('%', #{query}, '%')
group by rs.id, rs.user_id, rs.user_query, rs.parsed_intent, rs.create_time order by rs.create_time desc

select rs.id, rs.user_id as userId, rs.user_query as userQuery, rs.parsed_intent as parsedIntent, count(rr.id) as resultCount, rs.create_time as createTime from recommend_session rs left join recommend_result rr on rs.id = rr.session_id where rs.id = #{sessionId} group by rs.id, rs.user_id, rs.user_query, rs.parsed_intent, rs.create_time

select rr.id, rr.session_id as sessionId, rr.dish_id as dishId, rr.setmeal_id as setmealId, ifnull(d.name, s.name) as itemName, rr.score, rr.reason, rr.rank_no as rankNo, rr.create_time as createTime from recommend_result rr left join dish d on rr.dish_id = d.id left join setmeal s on rr.setmeal_id = s.id where rr.session_id = #{sessionId} order by rr.rank_no asc

select id, session_id as sessionId, tool_name as toolName, request_params as requestParams, response_summary as responseSummary, success, cost_ms as costMs, create_time as createTime from agent_tool_call_log where session_id = #{sessionId} order by create_time asc, id asc
